_comment: Fixture from gh api repos/<owner>/<repo>/pulls/<number>/comments (REST API, not GraphQL)
_source: cli/cli#13679 (2 inline review comments from real PR)
_note: This endpoint uses DIFFERENT field names than the GraphQL comments[] from gh pr view --json

elements._label: inline comment on a line range
elements.body: Now that we're adding a test for `printSummary`, let's cover all code paths...

elements._label: inline comment where line is null (outdated/deleted line)
elements.body: This is not needed. Please remove it.

_field_notes.author_field: user.login (REST) vs author.login (GraphQL via gh pr view)
_field_notes.line_can_be_null: line is null when the commented line no longer exists in the latest diff; use original_line as fallback
_field_notes.path_is_present: path is always a string (relative file path in the repo)
_field_notes.in_reply_to_id: null for top-level comments; integer ID for replies in a thread
